components.cards: Flat background (bg-zinc-900), 1px subtle border (border-zinc-800), no outer shadow. Use sharp contrasts.
components.tables: Dense. Use IBM Plex Sans for numeric columns. Right-align all currency values.
components.forms: Use Shadcn Input/Select. bg-zinc-900 border-zinc-800 focus:border-orange-500.
components.buttons: Primary: bg-orange-500 text-white hover:bg-orange-600. Secondary: border border-zinc-800 hover:bg-zinc-800 text-zinc-300.
components.navigation: Fixed left sidebar on desktop, bottom bar or hamburger on mobile. bg-zinc-950 border-r border-zinc-800.

motion_and_interactions.hover_states: All buttons and links must have explicit hover states (e.g., hover:bg-zinc-800). Cards should lift slightly (-translate-y-1) on hover with a border color change (hover:border-zinc-600).

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text contrast on bg-zinc-900 is at least 4.5:1. Primary orange button must use white text.
accessibility.test_ids: All interactive elements must have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='submit-sales-btn').

icons.style: Stroke width 2.0, standard sizing (w-5 h-5 for inline, w-8 h-8 for empty states). Use Flame icon for branding.

images.description: Glowing hot embers and coals in a fire - use for login page background or empty states.
images.usage_instructions: Apply heavily darkened overlay (bg-black/70) to ensure text readability.

images.description: Street food truck at night with customers.
images.usage_instructions: Use in the Operations Dashboard 'Welcome' banner or market profile cards.

images.description: A man wearing glasses and a v-neck shirt in the dark.
images.usage_instructions: Use as the owner/manager profile picture in the sidebar/header.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Initialize layout with a fixed Sidebar (Navigation) and main content area.
2. Use Tailwind dark mode classes explicitly (`bg-zinc-950`). The app is dark mode only.
3. Build key components with Shadcn: Card, Table, Form, Input, Button, Tabs.
4. Construct the 'Operations Dashboard' as the default view, integrating KPIs (Sales, COGS, Profit) in a grid.
5. Use 'recharts' for the Sales Performance Tracker. Use the Primary Orange and Emerald colors in the charts.
6. Make sure all currency formatting explicitly displays NZD (e.g., $1,234.56).
7. Implement a 'Margin Watch' table that highlights items where COGS exceeds threshold using the red warning color.
8. ALWAYS include data-testid on buttons, inputs, tabs, and critical links.
